description: Composition Green printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, dark green yoke with pin tucks and white stitch detailing, three-quarter sleeves with dark green tape detailing along the cuffs and a vented hem with white stitch detailing Fit Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash in lukewarm water with similar colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron Inspired by traditional Indian print and crafted in classic cuts, this kurta from vishudh makes for a fab addition to your ethno-modern wardrobe. The pin tucks and contrast stitch detailing on the yoke adds zing to the garment. Team it with jeans, leggings or loose pyjamas and heeled sandals. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'7" and chest 33"
